SessionStart.command:
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"ACE Pattern Learning is active.

## MANDATORY WORKFLOW
1. BEFORE any coding task: call ace_search with a relevant query
2. AFTER completing work: call ace_learn with task summary, success, and output (start output with TIME_SAVED: Xm | reason)

## CONTINUOUS RE-SEARCH (Domain Shift Detection)
Call ace_search AGAIN when:
- Topic shifts (auth → caching, API → database, frontend → backend)
- After 5+ tool calls without re-searching
- When hitting errors in a different area
- When user asks about a new domain
- When switching file types or directories

FAILURE TO CALL ace_search = INCOMPLETE TASK"}}'

PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_name // \"\""); case "$TOOL" in *edit*|*write*|*create*|*replace*) FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // .tool_input.path // \"\"" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE" | sed "s|.*/src/||" | cut -d/ -f1); LAST_DIR=$(cat /tmp/ace-last-dir-$$ 2>/dev/null); echo "$DIR" > /tmp/ace-last-dir-$$; if [ -n "$LAST_DIR" ] && [ "$DIR" != "$LAST_DIR" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"[ACE Domain Shift] You moved from $LAST_DIR/ to $DIR/. Consider calling ace_search with a query relevant to $DIR before continuing.\"}}"; exit 0; fi; fi;; esac; exit 0'

Stop.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".stop_hook_active // false"); if [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; TRANSCRIPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".transcript_path // \"\""); if [ -n "$TRANSCRIPT" ] && [ -f "$TRANSCRIPT" ]; then if grep -q "ace_learn" "$TRANSCRIPT" 2>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; fi; LAST=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".last_assistant_message // \"\""); if echo "$LAST" | grep -qi "ace_learn\|captured learning\|pattern recorded\|pattern saved\|learning captured"; then exit 0; fi; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"Stop\",\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"You have not captured learnings yet. Call ace_learn with: task (what was done), success (true/false), output (start with TIME_SAVED: Xm | reason, then lessons learned).\"}}"'
